name: architecture-debt-visualizer
description: Docs-vs-code reconciliation and independent architectural evaluation for any repo.

plugins.name: architecture-debt-visualizer
plugins.description: Reconciles design docs against code and evaluates the architecture across 9 dimensions (scale/extensibility requirements, scalability, extensibility, maintainability, performance/cost, data-architecture, observability, vision-alignment). Produces a scored, filterable HTML report.
